case_title: RANDALL BABTKIS VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BABTKIS, RANDALL AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
